svg.text: Best run AL-20260331-004 reached 1.3451 val_bpb. 88 scored runs are tracked here, with 23 kept and 65 discarded.
Latest run: AL-20260331-010 (discard) tested cheap fixed routing and dynamic depth routing may be complementary rather than redundant.
Read agent_lab/state.md for the live dashboard and agent_lab/tranches.md for the tranche map.
